name: Hunan Nanling Industrial Explosive Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Nanling Industrial Explosive Materials Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells civil explosive equipment and chemical products. Its products include permissible emulsion explosives for secondary coal mines; rock emulsion explosives; permissible emulsion explosives for tertiary coal mines; expanded ammonium nitrate explosives for primary coal mines; electronic detonators; and plastic detonators. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Changsha, China.
